rules.description: After the retirement date, workloads running on kubenet networking for AKS aren't supported.
rules.fix: Review and remediate based on recommendation

rules.description: Azure CNI improves cluster networking with dynamic IP allocation, scalable subnets, and direct pod-to-VNET connectivity. It supports Azure Network Policies and Calico for pods and nodes, optimizing efficiency and security
rules.fix: Review and remediate based on recommendation

rules.description: Azure Network Policy Manager for Azure Kubernetes Service clusters running Linux nodes is retiring. Migrate to Cilium Network Policy using Azure Container Networking Interface powered by Cilium before the retirement date.
rules.query: where tolower(tostring(properties.networkProfile.networkPolicy)) =~ 'azure' | extend agentPools = properties.agentPoolProfiles | where array_length(agentPools) > 0 | mv-expand agentPool = properties.agentPoolProfiles | where agentPool.osType !~ 'Windows' | distinct id
rules.fix: Azure Network Policy Manager for Azure Kubernetes Service clusters running Linux nodes is retiring. Migrate to Cilium Network Policy using Azure Container Networking Interface powered by Cilium before the retirement date.

rules.description: Migrate to Container insights managed identity authentication before the retirement date to maintain access and retain functionality.
rules.query: extend aksproperties = parse_json(tolower(properties)) | extend isEnabled = aksproperties.addonprofiles.omsagent.enabled | extend useAADAuth = aksproperties.addonprofiles.omsagent.config.useaadauth | where isEnabled =~ 'true' and useAADAuth != 'true'
rules.fix: Migrate to Container insights managed identity authentication before the retirement date to maintain access and retain functionality.

rules.description: From Kubernetes 1.26, Azure Disk and Azure File in-tree drivers are deprecated in favor of CSI drivers. Existing deployments remain operational but untested; users should switch to CSI drivers for new features and SKUs.
rules.query: where properties.storageProfile.diskCSIDriver.enabled != true or properties.storageProfile.fileCSIDriver.enabled != true or properties.storageProfile.blobCSIDriver.enabled != true
rules.fix: users should switch to CSI drivers for new features and SKUs
